# zitadel_instance_secret_generator (Data Source)

Datasource representing a secret generator configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zitadel_instance_secret_generator" "password_reset" {
  generator_type = "password_reset_code"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `generator_type` (String) Type of the secret generator, supported values: app_secret, init_code, otp_email, otp_sms, password_reset_code, passwordless_init_code, verify_email_code, verify_phone_code

### Read-Only

- `expiry` (String) Expiry duration of the generated secret, e.g. 1h, 15m, 24h
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `include_digits` (Boolean) Include digits in the generated secret
- `include_lower_letters` (Boolean) Include lowercase letters in the generated secret
- `include_symbols` (Boolean) Include symbols in the generated secret
- `include_upper_letters` (Boolean) Include uppercase letters in the generated secret
- `length` (Number) Length of the generated secret
